# Kent Services - Full Reference

> Kent Services is a local, owner-operated mobile mechanic and equipment repair business based in Leesburg, Florida. The company brings professional automotive and equipment service directly to the customer's location across Lake, Sumter, and Marion counties. It is open 7 days a week, including evenings and weekends, and texting is the preferred and fastest way to make contact. Kent Services also offers mobile welding in addition to mechanic work, which is uncommon among local mobile mechanics.

## Business overview

- Business name: Kent Services
- Type: Mobile mechanic and mobile equipment repair
- Owner-operator: Jacob (local Leesburg mechanic)
- Base location: Leesburg, FL 34748
- Service area: Lake County, Sumter County, and Marion County, Florida
- Cities served include: Leesburg, The Villages, Lady Lake, Tavares, Mount Dora, Eustis, Fruitland Park, Wildwood, Clermont, Ocala, Sumterville, Howey-in-the-Hills, and nearby communities
- Hours: Open 7 days a week, including evenings and weekends. Appointments can be made at any time.
- Preferred contact method: Text message. Jacob prefers text so he can review the details of each request and follow up reliably.
- Phone (call or text): (352) 724-5212
- Email: kentservices01@gmail.com
- Website: https://kentservicesfl.com
- Social and local profiles: Google Business Profile, Yelp, Facebook (facebook.com/Kentservices01), Nextdoor, and a Linktree at linktr.ee/kentservices01

## How pricing works

- The minimum charge for Kent Services to come out, barring a special arrangement made in advance, is a flat $125. This is the call-out and diagnostic fee.
- The $125 fee is charged per visit, not per item. If a customer has multiple things needing attention at one location (for example a car and a generator, or a tractor and a golf cart), the single flat fee covers looking at everything on site.
- If the customer decides to move forward with the repair, the $125 is subtracted from the total labor cost of the job.
- Labor cost increases from there depending on the scope of the work.
- When required parts are available nearby, Kent Services can often complete the entire job the same day. If parts must be ordered, Kent Services touches base once they arrive and schedules the repair.
- Advertised starting prices: oil change from $135 (includes the necessary oil); brake labor from $75 per wheel plus parts; battery service $125 plus the cost of a new battery if needed; electrical diagnostic and repair $125 call-out plus parts and any additional labor; pre-purchase vehicle inspection $200 (half due to book, half due on completion).
- Payment methods accepted: cash, check, credit and debit cards, and payment apps. An invoice is generated for all non-cash transactions. If a customer pays cash and wants an invoice, one can be created on request.

## Handling of large jobs

For larger jobs such as engine or transmission swaps, or any work that involves pulling the motor or reaching parts beneath it, Kent Services will often offer to pick up the vehicle and take it back to the shop to complete the repair, rather than leaving a vehicle torn apart in the customer's driveway for multiple days. Kent Services has a vehicle trailer and can pick up even non-running vehicles to tow them to and from the shop.

## Services in detail

### Auto Diagnostics and Electrical Repair
Professional on-site diagnostics using proper diagnostic tools to identify the true cause of a problem rather than guessing. Handles check engine lights, no-start conditions (car cranks but will not start, or will not crank at all), alternator testing and replacement, starter motor repair, battery and charging system testing, wiring and harness repair, electrical shorts and parasitic drains, and sensor and fault code diagnosis. Diagnostic fee is a flat $125, credited toward the repair.

### Brakes, Oil Changes, and Preventative Maintenance
Mobile oil changes starting at $135 including the necessary oil, performed at the customer's home or workplace. Brake service including pad and rotor replacement with labor starting at $75 per wheel plus parts, following a full brake system inspection. Also engine air filters, cabin air filters, fluid checks and top-offs, and scheduled preventative maintenance to prevent breakdowns.

### A/C, Battery, and Cooling System Repair
Service designed for Florida heat, which shortens battery life and strains A/C and cooling systems. Battery testing and replacement for $125 plus the cost of the battery if needed. A/C diagnosis and repair, cooling system repair, radiator service, thermostat replacement, hose and coolant leak repair, and overheating diagnosis.

### Engine, Transmission, Steering, and Suspension
Larger repairs including transmission service and replacement, engine diagnosis and repair, steering repair, suspension repair, struts and shocks, CV axles and joints, and wheel bearing replacement. Pick-up and tow service available so major jobs can be completed at the shop.

### Pre-Purchase Vehicle Inspections
A used-vehicle inspection performed at the seller's location before purchase. Price is $200, with half due to book the appointment and half due once the inspection is complete. The customer receives an in-depth written report of the vehicle's condition along with relevant photos and video. Covers engine, transmission, brakes, tires, suspension, battery, electrical, fluids, and leaks. Frequently used by buyers to negotiate a lower price or to avoid a bad purchase.

### Heavy Equipment and Machinery Repair
On-site repair for tractors, skid steers, backhoes, loaders, forklifts, generators, lawn mowers, and golf carts, plus preventative maintenance. The flat $125 call-out fee covers everything on site per visit. This broad equipment capability distinguishes Kent Services from most local mobile mechanics who only service cars and trucks.

### Mobile Welding
On-site repair welding and fabrication, including equipment and machinery welds, trailer repairs, brackets and mounts, gates and railings, cracked or broken metal, and general fabrication. Offered alongside mechanic and equipment work, so a repair and a weld can often be handled in the same visit. Pricing is discussed per job, usually with a photo of the project.

## Typical customer process

1. The customer finds Kent Services through a local profile, a search, or by seeing the service truck around town, then calls, texts, or messages with what they need. Text is preferred.
2. Kent Services comes to the customer for a flat $125 diagnostic or call-out fee, per visit, covering whatever is on site.
3. The customer receives an honest, upfront quote before any work begins. The $125 is credited toward the repair if the customer proceeds.
4. Many jobs are completed the same day when parts are available nearby. Larger jobs are scheduled once parts arrive, or the vehicle is trailered to the shop.

## Frequently asked questions

- What areas do you cover? Leesburg and the surrounding Lake, Sumter, and Marion counties, including The Villages, Lady Lake, Tavares, Mount Dora, Eustis, Fruitland Park, Wildwood, Clermont, and Ocala.
- How much does it cost for you to come out? A flat $125 per visit, credited toward the repair if the customer proceeds.
- Do evening or weekend appointments cost extra? No. We work 7 days a week, including evenings and weekends, so you can get service when it fits your schedule. Text is the fastest way to reach us.
- Do you work on more than cars? Yes, including generators, lawn mowers, tractors, skid steers, backhoes, loaders, and forklifts, plus mobile welding.
- What if the job is too big for my driveway? Kent Services can trailer the vehicle, including non-running vehicles, to the shop and return it when finished.
